checks.command: go build ./...  (run from engine/ module dir)
checks.notes: No compile errors across engine module.
Initial gofmt found one alignment issue in node.go; fixed via gofmt -w, re-checked clean.

All 4 subtests pass: leaf_round-trip, internal_round-trip, overflow_rejected, file_created_on_first_use. Verified runnable both from engine/ module dir (as ./btree/...) and from repo root (as ./engine/btree/..., matching the exact test spec string).
All 4 rows (leaf round-trip varying key counts, internal round-trip varying key counts, overflow rejection, file-created-on-first-use) map 1:1 to implemented subtests.

scope_boundary_check: Confirmed no lookup/insert/split/delete/scan logic was implemented -- only node struct definitions, Encode/Decode, and the OpenIndexFile file-creation helper.
note: This is internal self-consistency only, per invariant I4. No self-verification of correctness/quality was performed; that is the responsibility of the separate /cdr:verify step.
